name: A Real Challenge
description: "Zenobia gathers everyone to confess her desire to fight terrible monsters. Mythra has one in mind..."

name: Adenine's Password
description: "Get information from the Merc Group as a first step to looking for clues that will aid in deciphering the tablet."

name: Bana's Revenge
description: "Investigate the flow of illegal assets recorded in Bana's secret documents."

name: Bana's Secret Treasure
description: "Niranira from the SAB found a treasure trove while searching for Bana's secret assets. Help him open it."

name: Better Late Than Never
description: "Limuli is supposed to relieve Gegebi on watch duty, but he's late for the umpteenth time. Go and get him."

name: Big Job Preparations
description: "Chairman Bana has hired you to salvage goods from deep in the Cloud Sea. Use some of your new cash to buy supplies."

name: Birds of a Feather
description: "A Nopon gets angry with Finch after his guild ID was stolen by Tirkin. Find it to prove Finch isn't like those birdbrains!"

name: Cargo Escort
description: "You've been asked by Ysolde, from Argentum's Central Exchange, to guard her precious cargo from Krabbles."

name: Dagas's Past: Leftheria
description: "An old book you got in Argentum says something about an island kingdom... Go investigate it!"

name: Eternal Spirit
description: "In Argentum, Perun is intrigued by a noticeboard asking for help finding a missing child. Let's do what we can."

name: Fame and Family
description: "The singer Falala wants to become famous to find her son. She will need all the help she can get."

name: Foorara's Walky-Walky
description: Find Foorara around the world.

name: Hide and Seek
description: "The kids in Bower Lounge have got you playing hide-and-seek. Find the three of them somewhere in Argentum."

name: Hot Spring Bonanza
description: "Kasandra won first prize in a raffle - a lifetime's free entry to an Ardainian hot spring! Visit it with Sheba and Kora. (DLC Quest)"

name: Into the Open Sky
description: "Panpan is a trainee Nopon pilot. He's close to getting his license, so you offered to help him out."

name: Limits of Awareness
description: "In the old tomes she's been studying, Adenine has found coordinates for a location. Go there and check it out!"

name: Making Love Source
description: "Poppi's interested in a love potion. Gather Flutterheart Grass in Tantal and make the concoction! (DLC Quest)"

name: Nopon Doubloons Ahoy
description: "Collect all 11 legendary Nopon Doubloons and help Nunui restore the renown of Pyrithium Trade Guild."

name: Salvager Rank
description: Try to attain the highest Salvager Rank.

name: Twelve Brothersisterpon
description: Find Motata's 11 siblings across the world.

name: Uncover the Truth
description: "Help is needed to uncover the truth about the founding of Argentum. Go and ask for more information."

name: A Small War
description: Salvage another Morph Orb to replace the Gormotti youth's memento which has been stolen by an Ardainian youth.

name: A Young Man's Prize
description: "A young Ardainian man named Eluned is after a Snow-White Rhino native to parts of Gormott. Catch one for him."

name: Ardun Rearing
description: Help the Ardun to grow by feeding it.

name: Artificial Blade Parts 1
description: "Tora needs a Perfect Range Sensor and Bion Connectors for his artificial Blade. Help him out, so you can all save Nia!"

name: Artificial Blade Parts 2
description: "Tora needs a Perfect Range Sensor and Bion Connectors for his artificial Blade. Help him out, so you can all save Nia!"

name: Bearing Her Soul
description: "Ursula is scouted for her singing talents, but needs to overcome her shyness. Help her come out of her shell."

name: Buoy Can't Swim
description: "By a lake in Gormott, you met a young boy who wants to learn to swim. Collect some Buoyweed for him."

name: Concerned Carpenter
description: "Go look for Siorge the carpenter's son, Pawli, who went on an errand and still hasn't returned"

name: Crane Criminals
description: "Sniff out the criminals who broke the crane in Torigoth. Start by asking around town."

name: Crystal Clear
description: "While walking in Torigoth, you are confronted by a couple of Blades. Could they be Core Crystal hunters?"

name: Diplomatic Tensions
description: "Resolve the dispute that has sprung up between the people of Torigoth and the Ardainian Army."

name: Fresh and Fruity
description: "Twaina has asked you to gather some ingredients for her famous pie. In the name of delicious pie, do it!"

name: Go for it, Electra!
description: "Electra just wants to be useful, but she despairs when she cannot control her power. Where did she run off to?"

name: Grow, Little Vegetables!
description: "Help Nomon grow some nice, nutritious vegetables."

name: Knocked About Nopon
description: "You've come across a Nopon trader being attacked on the Garanti Plain. Defeat the monsters and help her out!"

name: Newt Recruits
description: "Newt is unimpressed with the training regimen at the Ardainian base. Teach them a thing or two with a mock battle."

name: No-Penny Nopon
description: "Poor Shatoto has been duped and left penniless by some soldiers. Cheer him up with some Noodle Soup!"

name: Nopon of Good Tastes
description: "Show Bipopo to Tora's house, where he can play Tiger! Tiger! (DLC Quest)"

name: One Step Ahead
description: "A mercenary and his companion were separated while searching for Healing Herb for a doctor. Help reunite them."

name: Our Daily Bread
description: "Kasandra gets a sudden craving for Lucky Dawn Bread, which is only sold at dawn. Go with her to get some!"

name: Passion of the Artisan
description: "Some lumber has disappeared from the Nocclia Timber Site. Find the culprit for Tucker the lumberjack."

name: Paying It Forward
description: "Bowery asked you to help Tenne by becoming the owner of her shop, Llysiau Greens."

name: Pest Control 1
description: "Taking note of Praxis's gut feeling, head to tackle the Urayan monster problem mentioned in the memo."

name: Pest Control 2
description: "Taking note of Praxis's gut feeling, head to tackle the monster problem at the Spirit Crucible mentioned in the memo."

name: Pest Control 3
description: "Taking note of Praxis's gut feeling, head to tackle the monster problem in Leftheria mentioned in the memo."

name: Powered-Up Poppi
description: Tatazo has developed new plans to power Poppi-up. Help him collect the materials that he needs.

name: Repair Torigoth's Crane
description: "Gather the parts that Natheus needs to repair the crane that keeps getting broken by someone."

name: Shiny New Power
description: "Following letter Tora got, gather Blade special data and then head to Bulge Harbor in Mor Ardain, meh! (DLC Quest)"

name: Star-Crossed Lovers
description: "A young couple heading to the shipyard have been beset by monsters! Defeat the monsters and help them out."

name: Stop, Thief!
description: A young boy stole Roc's Core Crystal and escaped to Torigoth. Ask around and search for clues.

name: The Case of the Crane
description: "Torigoth's crane has been breaking down a lot recently. Fix the crane and catch whoever's responsible."

name: The Driver in Ice
description: "Llonya's Driver is encased in ice and she's looking for a Blade who can help. Melt the ice for her."

name: The Militia's Request
description: "Gather Melosian Honey and deliver it to Militia Chief Moui."

name: The Missing Order
description: "The order from Nopon trader, Mopopo, is past due. Go to the Nopon Camp and check on Mopopo."

name: The Race to Find Nia
description: "Nia has been imprisoned by the Imperial Army. Ask around in Torigoth to find out as much about her as you can, fast."

name: The Riddle on the Wall
description: "You found a riddle on a mural in Torigoth. What could it mean? The first thing to do is to figure out how to read it."

name: Tirkin Suppression
description: "An Ardainian soldier needs your help to get rid of some vicious Tirkin that trouble the public."

name: Tranquility
description: "While shopping, Vess asks for some ingredients that have become scarce in Gormott. Go and gather them for her."

name: Umon Bounces Back
description: "You found Umon about to throw himself off a pier in Torigoth. There must be a way to help ease his worries"

name: Umon's Ship
description: "Help Umon to complete a Titan craft, so that you can borrow a boat to journey to the World Tree."

name: Upgrades and Tinkering
description: "Tora's tinkering has paid off, and the Cloud Sea Compass is much stronger! Travel around to find new Salvage Points. (DLC Quest)"

name: Whereabouts Unknown
description: "A vermin specialist and some guards went to check on the Volff and never came back. See if you can find them."

name: File:The Case of the Crane icon.jpg
A Hat Fit for a Lady
description: "Find Beemer's wayward daughter Lhagen. She went to Argentum to find herself the hat of her dreams. (DLC Quest)"

name: A Helping Hand
description: "Julion has requested your help with Indoline refugee relief effort. Go to each distribution to lend a hand."

name: A Mercenary's Honor
description: ''"A group of mercs haven't returned from a mission to watch Ardainian forces. Head to Temperantia to find them and bring them back. (DLC Quest)"''

name: A Secret Cure
description: "Iona needs help healing Cole without getting his hopes up. Find a doctor who can make medicine for him."

name: A Smith's Pastime
description: "Chulev, a retired blacksmith, has been dabbling in making accessories. Bring him the materials to get one made! (DLC Quest)"

name: A Test of Strength
description: "The mercs want to test the strength of their new leader. Head to the training ground and show them who's boss."

name: All's Fair
description: "To liven up a boring duty, Azami keeps an eye on a suspicious group in town. Find out what they're up to!"

name: Boys and Bullies
description: "A young boy has asked you to get back his treasure from the bully who took it. Grant his request."

name: Dagas's Past: Folktales
description: "A book bought from a shop in Uraya mentions an ancient kingdom that was near Temperantia. Go find out more!"

name: Difficult Decisions
description: "Jelved thinks that the mercenary Nicc may be responsible for his parents' deaths. See if you can dig up the past and learn the truth."

name: Family vs. Fiends
description: "Some ruffian is trying to steal rations from a mother and child. Lend the unfortunate victims a hand."

name: Flames of Justice
description: "Godfrey declares his desire to support the weak and uphold justice! Help him in his righteous cause!"

name: Follow Your Passion
description: "Go on a salvage mission to return treasured paintings to their owner."

name: Gotta Start Somewhere!
description: "On the way to Fonsa Myma, you found a group of mercenaries in a spot of trouble. See what you can do to help."

name: Jeline and Shaun
description: "Jeline asked you to search for Shaun. Look for him outside of Fonsa Myma."

name: Leadership Qualities
description: "Yew has asked for your help in deciding which of three candidates to hire for a new Merc Group position."

name: Lingering Resentment
description: "Chancing upon Indoline survivors in Olethro Ruins, you were attacked on sight. Find out about their schemes."

name: M.I.A. Nopon
description: "Look for Budada, who went missing after saying he was going to Uraya to observe the life of Ignas. (DLC Quest)"

name: Marvelous Mercenaries
description: "Yew landed you a big job in the hopes of building the mercenaries' reputation. Go see what the client has to say."

name: Mysterious Note
description: "The note you found in Acid Gullet is a map of sorts with a spot marked on it. Why not go and see what you find?"

name: Nature Boy
description: "Floren wants to restore a wounded tree back to health. Look for the required medicine in Gormott."

name: Precious Yearnings
description: "During a chat at the inn, Agate reveals her dream of discovering a totally new mineral. Help her make it come true!"

name: Sniff out the Spy
description: "It seems that a spy may have infiltrated the Merc Group. See if you can identify them."

name: Sunken Boosters
description: "A ship carrying a shipment of Boosters sank off Gormott's Lascham Island. Talk to Seesaw the Nopon to learn more. (DLC Quest)"

name: The Supply Situation
description: "Yew is worried that his mercenary group doesn't have the supplies it needs. Help him to develop his group."

name: The Titan Scholar
description: "A Nopon waiting at the port in Fonsa Myma asked you to go looking for his teacher, who researches Titans."

name: The Trendy Patissier
description: "Gorg's Just Desserts brand is booming across Alrest. Try to establish new distribution channels with Boreas! (DLC Quest)"

name: Theory and Praxis
description: "While stopping by an Urayan cafe, you see a boy consoling his crying younger brother. Find out what the matter is."

name: True Colors
description: "Dobran, an artist working in Fonsa Myma, has requested that you find her ingredients for her paint."

name: Unspoken Suspicion
description: "A shady merc demands you return classified documents you know nothing about. You'll have to fight him off."

name: Vandham's Last Wish
description: "Yew wants to talk to you about a message that Vandham left. Return to the village and see what he has to say."

name: Would-Be Mercs
description: "Some Garfont kids who went hunting for materials still haven't come home. Look for them at the Greatmaw Rapids."

name: File:A Hat Fit for a Lady.png
Dagas's Past: Gormott
description: "According to a book from an Ardainian shop, Gormott was once a republic. Go and see what you can find out."

name: Defeat Arrodh
description: "Information suggests that Brionac leaders are trading in commodities. Find the leaders and defeat them."

name: Defeat Bhianc
description: "Information suggests that Brionac leaders are trading in commodities. Find the leaders and defeat them."

name: Defeat Wiggins
description: "Information suggests that Brionac leaders are trading in commodities. Find the leaders and defeat them."

name: Ecological Survey
region: Empire of Mor Ardain (Nharil Central Plaza)
description: You found a flyer requesting help with an ecological survey of fauna in the Thermal Exhaust Fork. Check it out!

name: Failure and Success
region: Empire of Mor Ardain (Nharil Central Plaza)
description: "Perceval comes to the aid of a woman after she is set upon by a group of men in the poor quarter of Alba Cavanich"

name: Farewell, Good Friend
region: Empire of Mor Ardain (Ayvill Shopping District)
description: "Farraw's friend is moving away and she wants to make him a pendant. Collect Rosary Moss at the World Tree to help."

name: Hard to Stomach
region: Empire of Mor Ardain (Nharil Central Plaza)
description: "Overheard a story about stolen docs which a monster then swallowed. Find them and claim the reward."

name: Industrial Sort of Tour
description: "Toutour's four customers disappeared during a guided tour of an old factory. Help Toutour by finding them. (DLC Quest)"

name: Insurgent Investigations
description: "Senator Stulc has managed to obtain information about an anti-imperialist group. Continue the investigations."

name: Lila's Location
description: Tora suggests that following the flow of materials for artificial Blades might lead you to Lila. Start with Bion Connectors.

name: Lost Kingdom
description: "Self-declared king Dagas commands you to search for his long vanquished kingdom. Accompany him on his quest."

name: Midnight Feasting
region: Empire of Mor Ardain (Nharil Central Plaza)
description: "Ghosts are having loud parties at the Bellyful Canteen in Mor Ardain's Old Industrial District. Go and investigate! (DLC Quest)"

name: Road to the Capital
description: "A merchant on his way to the capital Alba Cavanich has asked you to eliminate some monsters on the road."

name: Search for Alec
region: Empire of Mor Ardain (Geothermal Plant Lobby)
description: "Amir asked you to find Alec. Find Alec and get the plant back in running order! (DLC Quest)"

name: Search for Sarrac
region: Empire of Mor Ardain (Geothermal Plant Lobby)
description: "Amir asked you to find Sarrac. Find Sarrac and get the plant back in running order! (DLC Quest)"

name: Search for Tekuteku
region: Empire of Mor Ardain (Geothermal Plant Lobby)
description: "Amir asked you to find Tekuteku. Find Tekuteku and get the plant back in running order! (DLC Quest)"

name: The Lone Watchman
region: Empire of Mor Ardain (Hardhaigh Dock, Lv. 2)
description: "Inform Captain Maddock's subordinate Irving of his new orders. Irving is at the Bathein Watchtower. (DLC Quest)"

name: The Nopon Murals
region: Empire of Mor Ardain (Beraf Industry Ward)
description: "Smuggle Alisdeigh, the Ardainian archeologist, into Uraya, and solve the mystery of the ancient Nopon murals."

name: The Ties that Bind
region: Empire of Mor Ardain (Nharil Central Plaza)
description: "A Nopon mother seeks her daughter, who has gotten mixed up with a strange cult. Get some information around town."

name: We Meet Again
region: Empire of Mor Ardain (Ayvill Shopping District)
description: "A boy you met in Gormott is now a Driver with no time to spare. You offer to deliver presents to his young siblings."

name: World Tree Disaster
description: "A refugee boy told of a Nopon who fell to the World Tree and has not been seen since. Help search for him."

name: Judicium's Legacy
description: "Ismet asked you to find the remains of ancient weapons used in a great war long ago. He intends to study them."

name: A Ripe New Frontier
description: "A Nopon wants to set up shop in a new land."

name: Bana the Schemer
description: "Bana is up to something. Go to Indol to gather information and see if you can figure out what he's planning."

name: Indol's Teachings
description: "Would-be reporter Mololo has asked you to help gather information on the warrior monks in the Sanctum."

name: Mellica the Chorister
description: "Mellica feels like someone is spying on her all the time."

name: Artisanal Accessories
description: "The self-proclamed greatest artisan on Alrest got it in his head to make you an accessory from Ripbik Ellok materials. (DLC Quest)"

name: Cannadea's Troubles
description: "Cannadea is almost done with her concoction, but a bunch of Rodonya prevent her from getting the last ingredient."

name: Corvin's Approach
description: "Plans to deploy troops to the Genbu Crown are being thwarted by some Garlus. They need to be removed. (DLC Quest)"

name: Dagas's Past: Tantal
description: "A tablet in a Tantalese bookshop claims there once were houses on the drifts in Tantal. Check it out!"

name: Fly in the Ointment
description: "Dahlia hears from Kastina's mother that her No. 1 fan didn't come home last night. Find her quick!"

name: Girl Power-Off
description: "Mythra and Kora go head-to-head in an epic struggle to determine who has the most Girl Power. Who will it be?"

name: Glory from the Past
description: "You found a dead man clutching a message describing a certain location. What could be concealed there?"

name: Most Awful News?!
description: "Finch caught wind of some big news at the inn, but she's managed to forget it, as you might expect. Investigate a little bit with the mercs. (DLC Quest)"

name: Partners
description: "A Nopon historian has fallen off a ruin after an argument with his partner. Humhum now needs your rescue."

name: Salvage King
description: "King Eulogimenos has asked you to salvage four rare treasures from all over Alrest."

name: Tender-Hearted Beast
description: "Wulfric hears about a rockfall in the mine which left several people trapped. Hurry to the scene and help!"

name: The Calm and the Storm
description: "Eulogimenos requests the purging of enemies from the snow drifts around the capital. Protect the city!"

name: The Lost Turtle
description: "You bumped into a young boy upset at having lost a good-luck charm given to him by his father. Help him find it."

name: The Writer's Assistant
description: Melusia wants to pick ice flowers, but the area where they grow is chock full of monsters. Pick some in her stead.

name: A Phonex Tale
description: "Nim promises to help a lonely Phonex called Mix who she encounters in Fonsett Village"

name: At Wit's End
description: "You encountered a fretful Nopon overwhelmed by an enormous job he took on but can't complete. Help him gather the items he needs."

name: Beneath the Aurora
description: "Len's keen to propose to his girlfriend on their holiday to Leftheria. Give him a hand to make the moment perfect! (DLC Quest)"

name: Bright Spark
description: "Lettina's children and husband have left the village and not come back. Help Crossette search Ysheva Harbor. (DLC Quest)"

name: Cleared of All Charges
description: "The vegetables growing in Fonsett are being stolen by somebody. Godfrey, Perceval, and Perun are on the case to sniff out the thief. (DLC Quest)"

name: Fool's Gold
description: "Sheba is not amused after realizing a trader tricked her into buying a barren island. Find them and get a refund!"

name: History Teacher
description: "You've been asked to find someone to teach history. See if you can find a suitable candidate"

name: Language Teacher
description: "You've been asked to find someone to teach reading and writing. See if you can find a suitable candidate"

name: Maiden Voyage
description: "You stumbled upon a Blade being attacked by monsters. Come to her aid."

name: Merclibay's Mightiest
description: "A foul monster has made its lair on Merclibay Islet in Leftheria. Defeat it to make the seas safe for travelers again! (DLC Quest)"

name: School is in Session
description: "Willas, the mayor of Fonsett, wants to found a school so the village children have brighter futures. Help him get the school up and running"

name: Science Teacher
description: "You've been asked to find someone to teach mathematics and science. See if you can find a suitable candidate"

name: Stolen Keepsake
description: "You meet an old man whose precious memento was stolen while he was going for a stroll. Get it back for him!"

name: Time is Money
description: "The amount of money Corinne received was smaller than expected! Go ask the couriers if they know what's going on."

name: Souvenirs from Morytha
description: "A merchant would like you to look for valuable rarities in the Cliffs of Morytha. If you find something like that, bring it to her!"

name: Mystery Launch Codes
region: Land of Morytha (Wall Power Control Room)
description: "By studying a tablet in Morytha, you learned about a launch code split in two parts. Satisfy Adenine's curiosity! (DLC Quest)"

name: Timeworn Machine
region: Land of Morytha (Great Wall Tunnel No. 8)
description: "You found instructions displayed on an old machine that was lying in the road. Follow them and see what happens."

name: Artificial Intelligence
description: "Hordes of artificial Blades at the World Tree threaten Alrest's safety. KOS-MOS suggests wiping them out."
